message:
fix(backend): GPU metrics races, proxy safety, connection reuse, cache stampede (#7015-#7025) (#7051)

* fix(agent): race conditions, data corruption, connection reuse (#7015-#7018, #7024-#7025)

- Use atomic.Bool for loggedClusterError to prevent data race (#7015)
- Surface ListClusters errors and skip GPU metrics instead of saving
  zeroed snapshots (#7016)
- Serialize saveToDisk with diskMu and use atomic file swap via
  os.Rename to prevent JSON corruption (#7017)
- Log warning for unparseable timestamps instead of silently dropping
  snapshots, preserving historical data (#7018)
- Cache http.Client per cluster API server URL to avoid per-query TLS
  handshake and connection leaks (#7024)
- Replace predictionsActive.Reset() with set-then-delete-stale to
  eliminate zeroed scrape window during predictions update (#7025)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(api): GPU metric accuracy, proxy safety, snapshot limit cap (#7019-#7023)

- Set MemoryUtilizationPct to 0 when no memory metrics available
  instead of mirroring GPU compute utilization (#7019)
- Only count pods with explicit GPU resource requests; stop counting
  non-GPU system pods on GPU nodes as GPU consumers (#7020)
- Add singleflight guard to GA4 and Umami script proxy to coalesce
  concurrent cold-cache fetches into a single upstream request (#7021)
- Wrap all io.ReadAll calls with io.LimitReader(maxProxyResponseBytes)
  to prevent multi-GB memory exhaustion from oversized responses (#7022)
- Clamp snapshot query ?limit parameter to maxSnapshotQueryLimit=10000
  to prevent unbounded row requests (#7023)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
